text:
ICL amount. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: INCREASED_ICL 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: Y = Yes 
 N = No 
 9 = Not Applicable 
 X = Unknown 

COMMENT: This variable was new in 2011. It applies ONLY to the Enhanced Alternative Plans that offer reduced 
cost-sharing (i.e., where variable called REDUCED_COST_SHARE= “Y”). 
 The Initial Coverage Limit (ICL) phase of the Part D benefit is also referred to as the coverage gap. 

The CCW constructs the Plan Characteristics
